meaning: vt.忽然弹出,挥动vi.调情,摇晃的移动,玩弄,摇晃地摆动,摆动,轻率地对待n.卖弄风情的人,调情的人
examples: Her husband is an incorrigible flirt.
Locked indoors, unable to get on their bicycles and hang out with their friends, teens have turned to social media and their mobile phones to gossip, flirt andsocialize with their peers.
Shares in Edinburgh-based Cupid Plc, which include cupid.com, benaughty.com and flirt.com, fell by 57% to 49p.
Every day 900 million people haggle, gossip, flirt, laugh, scream and cry on a Nokia.
